zh.Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯
zh.Sawley, Ripon, West Riding,Yorkshire, En: 英國英格蘭越可爾薩利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Manningham於1365年出生在英國越可爾薩利時，她的父親Roger Manningham19歲，母親Mrs Roger Manningham19歲。她於1385年與Sir Richard Norton在英國越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1431年5月20日在英國越可爾諾頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國越可爾沃斯。

zh-hans.Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯
zh-hans.Sawley, Ripon, West Riding,Yorkshire, En: 英国英格兰越可爾薩利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Manningham于1365年出生在英国越可爾薩利时，她的父亲Roger Manningham19岁，母亲Mrs Roger Manningham19岁。她于1385年与Sir Richard Norton在英国越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1431年5月20日在英国越可爾諾頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国越可爾沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Manningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Manningham (WR Yorks).

variants.name: Mangham
meanings: English: shortened form of Manningham, a habitational name from Manningham near Bradford (Yorkshire). The placename derives from an Old English personal name Mægen + Old English connective -ing- or the Old English group name suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Manningham was born in 1365, in Sawley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Roger Manningham, was 19 and her mother, Mrs Roger Manningham, was 19. She married Sir Richard Norton in 1385, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 May 1431, in Norton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Wath, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Manningham est née en 1365, à Sawley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger Manningham, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs Roger Manningham, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Norton en 1385, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mai 1431, à Norton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Manningham 1365 in Sawley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Manningham 19 und ihre Mutter Mrs Roger Manningham 19. Sie hat 1385 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England Sir Richard Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Mai 1431 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Norton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Wath, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Manningham è nata il nel 1365 nel Sawley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Roger Manningham, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mrs Roger Manningham, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Norton nel 1385, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1431, nel Norton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Wath, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Manninghamが1365年にイギリスヨークシュアイアサウリーで生まれた時，父Roger Manninghamは19歳，母Mrs Roger Manninghamは19歳であった。1385年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでSir Richard Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1431年5月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアノートンで66歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Manningham(이)가 1365년 영국 요르크실르 사w리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Manningham(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Roger Manningham(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 Sir Richard Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1431년 5월 20일 영국 요르크실르 노르턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 왓h에 묻혔다.

mn.Sawley, Ripon, West Riding,Yorkshire, En: Sawley, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Manningham nasceu em 1365, em Sawley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Manningham, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Roger Manningham, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Norton em 1385, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de maio de 1431, em Norton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Manningham родилась в 1365 г. в местности савли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Manningham было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Roger Manningham, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Norton в 1385 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 мая 1431 г. в местности нортон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности ват, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Manningham nació en 1365, en Sawley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Manningham, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs Roger Manningham, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Norton en 1385, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1431, en Norton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
